title.zh: 1024通道稀疏感知聚焦采样神经接口芯片

zh: 集成 CIM 存算一体的热点预测引擎，自动定位神经活动热点
支持 8-bit 全景监控与 11-bit 高精度跟踪动态切换，在保证采样质量的同时实现数据压缩
实现0.000222mm<sup>2</sup>/通道、0.34μW/通道的极致面积、功耗效率
en: CIM-based hotspot prediction engine for automatic neural activity localization
Supports dynamic switching between 8-bit panoramic monitoring and 11-bit precision tracking
Achieves 0.000222 mm<sup>2</sup>/ch area and 0.34 μW/ch power efficiency

papers.zh: ISSCC: Sparsity-Aware Neural Interface with CIM-Based Predictive Focused Sampling for Hotspot Spike Tracking
papers.en: ISSCC: Sparsity-Aware Neural Interface with CIM-Based Predictive Focused Sampling for Hotspot Spike Tracking

title.zh: 事件驱动的混合神经网络处理器
title.en: Event-Driven Hybrid ANN-SNN Neural Signal Processor

zh: 支持 EEG/ECG/EMG/LFP 等神经信号分析
融合 ANN 与 SNN，可重构架构灵活切换
采用 BNN 常开 + CNN 事件触发，功耗低至 0.99 μJ/class
en: Supports EEG/ECG/EMG/LFP multi-modal neural signal analysis
Reconfigurable ANN+SNN hybrid architecture
Always-on BNN + event-triggered CNN; as low as 0.99 μJ/class

papers.zh: TBioCAS: A 0.99-to-4.38 μJ/class Event-Driven Hybrid Neural Network Processor for Full-Spectrum Neural Signal Analyses
papers.en: TBioCAS: A 0.99-to-4.38 μJ/class Event-Driven Hybrid Neural Network Processor for Full-Spectrum Neural Signal Analyses

title.zh: 多拓扑在线学习SNN处理器

zh: 可重构电路设计，适配脉冲全连接/循环/卷积神经网络
支持基于TR-STDP的在线学习算法
可完成ECG 异常检测、图像分类、MNIST 识别等在线学习任务
en: Reconfigurable for FC / recurrent / convolutional spiking networks
Supports TR-STDP online learning
Demonstrated on ECG anomaly detection, image classification, and MNIST

papers.zh: TBioCAS: A 510 μW 0.738-mm² 6.2-pJ/SOP Online Learning Multi-Topology SNN Processor With Unified Computation Engine in 40-nm CMOS
papers.en: TBioCAS: A 510 μW 0.738-mm² 6.2-pJ/SOP Online Learning Multi-Topology SNN Processor With Unified Computation Engine in 40-nm CMOS

title.zh: 非结构稀疏感知深度SNN处理器

zh: 基于3D加法树的时间步并行计算
非结构稀疏数据并行执行
支持 spike-Q/K/V 与自注意力机制（Spike-SSA）
en: 3D adder-tree for parallel temporal-step computation
Unstructured sparse data parallel execution
Supports spike Q/K/V and self-attention (Spike-SSA)

papers.zh: JSSC: An Energy-Efficient Unstructured Sparsity-Aware Deep SNN Accelerator With 3-D Computation Array
papers.en: JSSC: An Energy-Efficient Unstructured Sparsity-Aware Deep SNN Accelerator With 3-D Computation Array

zh: 双路径稀疏计算核
EMA-free脉冲自注意力引擎
1位/8位加法-树（adder-tree）结构阵列
en: Dual-path sparse compute core
EMA-free spiking self-attention engine
1-bit / 8-bit adder-tree array

papers.zh: TCASAI: A 28nm Spiking Vision Transformer Accelerator with Dual-Path Sparse Compute Core and EMA-free Self-Attention Engine for Embodied Intelligence
papers.en: TCASAI: A 28nm Spiking Vision Transformer Accelerator with Dual-Path Sparse Compute Core and EMA-free Self-Attention Engine for Embodied Intelligence

title.zh: 多稀疏性挖掘的混合神经网络片上训练处理器
title.en: Multi-Sparsity Hybrid Neural Network On-Chip Training Processor

zh: 融合Feedback Alignment机制进行在线学习
通过利用不同粒度的稀疏性来提高计算效率
混合ANN/SNN结构，支持在线训练与本地化适配
en: Feedback Alignment-based online learning
Multi-granularity sparsity exploitation for efficiency
Hybrid ANN/SNN structure for local adaptation

papers.zh: TBioCAS: HybMED: A Hybrid Neural Network Training Processor With Multi-Sparsity Exploitation for Internet of Medical Things
papers.en: TBioCAS: HybMED: A Hybrid Neural Network Training Processor With Multi-Sparsity Exploitation for Internet of Medical Things

title.zh: 生物神经元启发的无线脑机接口系统芯片
title.en: Neuron-Inspired Wireless Implantable Neural Interface SoC

zh: 支持32通道事件驱动神经脉冲检测与无线传输
Direct Multiplexing前端 + Spike Folding电路，提升面积效率
功耗仅1.38μW/ch，面积仅0.0032mm²/ch，压缩率超500×
en: 32-channel event-driven spike detection with wireless transmission
Direct Multiplexing front-end + Spike Folding for area efficiency
1.38 μW/ch power, 0.0032 mm²/ch area, >500× compression

papers.zh: CICC: A Neuron-Inspired 0.0032mm²–1.38μW/Ch Wireless Implantable Neural Interface with Direct Multiplexing Front-End and Event-Driven Spike Detection and Transmission
papers.en: CICC: A Neuron-Inspired 0.0032mm²–1.38μW/Ch Wireless Implantable Neural Interface with Direct Multiplexing Front-End and Event-Driven Spike Detection and Transmission

title.zh: 用于视网膜假体的仿生视觉信号处理芯片
title.en: Neuromorphic Visual Processor for Retinal Prostheses (SpikeSEE)

zh: 事件驱动的动态场景处理，适用于视网膜假体
基于脉冲的高效视觉编码管线
在真实世界假体视觉仿真任务上验证
en: Event-driven dynamic scene processing for retinal prostheses
Energy-efficient spike-based visual encoding pipeline
Evaluated on real-world prosthetic vision simulation tasks

papers.zh: Neural Networks: SpikeSEE: An energy-efficient dynamic scenes processing framework for retinal prostheses
papers.en: Neural Networks: SpikeSEE: An energy-efficient dynamic scenes processing framework for retinal prostheses

title.zh: 小面积、低功耗、可配置的生物电信号模拟前端芯片
title.en: Low-Power Configurable Analog Front-End for Multi-Modal Biosignal Recording

zh: 引入自稳定斩波放大结构和伪源伺服拓扑，降低 1/f 噪声
集成可调主动伪电阻实现灵活的高通滤波器
输入参考噪声1.7 µV<sub>rms</sub>，支持各种ExG,适用于植入式与可穿戴式多模态神经接口系统
en: Auto-zeroed chopper amplifier + pseudo source-follower for low 1/f noise
Tunable active pseudo-resistor for flexible high-pass filtering
1.7 µV<sub>rms</sub> input-referred noise; suitable for implantable and wearable ExG interfaces

papers.zh: TBioCAS: An Energy-Efficient Small-Area Configurable Analog Front-End Interface for Diverse Biosignals Recording
papers.en: TBioCAS: An Energy-Efficient Small-Area Configurable Analog Front-End Interface for Diverse Biosignals Recording

title.zh: 射频能量收集的可重构前端芯片

zh: 在 -22.5 dBm 到 -3 dBm 的输入范围内保持 1.3V-1.8V 稳定输出，无需额外的 DC-DC 转换器
峰值效率达 42.8%，灵敏度低至 -23.6 dBm
适用于自供电物联网传感器、无线植入式医疗器件等超低功耗系统
en: Stable 1.3–1.8 V output across –22.5 to –3 dBm input range, no DC-DC converter required
Peak efficiency 42.8%, sensitivity down to –23.6 dBm
Suitable for self-powered IoT sensors and wireless implantable medical devices

papers.zh: TCAS-II: An On-Chip Reconfigurable Front-End for Ultra-Low-Power RF Energy Harvesting
papers.en: TCAS-II: An On-Chip Reconfigurable Front-End for Ultra-Low-Power RF Energy Harvesting

title.zh: 毫秒级恢复自适应神经信号采集前端芯片
title.en: Self-Adaptive Neural Recording Front-End with Millisecond Artifact Recovery

zh: 缩短刺激伪影恢复时间缩短至 3 ms 以内
具备可调高通截止频率（0.1-15 Hz），支持高保真 LFP 与 Spike 记录
下一代高分辨率闭环神经调控接口、癫痫与帕金森病治疗设备
en: Stimulation artifact recovery within 3 ms
Tunable high-pass cutoff (0.1–15 Hz) for simultaneous LFP and Spike recording
Targets next-generation closed-loop neural interfaces for epilepsy and Parkinson's therapy

papers.zh: TBioCAS: Self-Adaptive Pseudo-Resistors Enabling Millisecond-Level Artifact Recovery and High-Linearity for Neural Recording Front-Ends
papers.en: TBioCAS: Self-Adaptive Pseudo-Resistors Enabling Millisecond-Level Artifact Recovery and High-Linearity for Neural Recording Front-Ends

zh: 高效支持卷积神经网络和深度学习算法
峰值性能 413 GOPS@8bit，可实现从图像预处理到目标分类的完整视觉处理流水线
芯片面积4mm × 6mm, 200MHz系统时钟下运算性能208GOPS，能耗效率194GOPS/W
en: Peak performance 413 GOPS@8-bit; end-to-end vision processing pipeline
4 mm × 6 mm die; 208 GOPS at 200 MHz, 194 GOPS/W energy efficiency
Supports CNN and deep learning workloads

papers.zh: TCSVT: A Heterogeneous Parallel Processor for High-Speed Vision Chip
papers.en: TCSVT: A Heterogeneous Parallel Processor for High-Speed Vision Chip

papers.zh: A High Speed Programmable Vision Chip for Real-Time Object Detection
papers.en: A High Speed Programmable Vision Chip for Real-Time Object Detection

title.zh: 融合SOM神经网络的混合可重构千帧视觉芯片
title.en: 1000-fps Hybrid Reconfigurable Vision Chip with SOM Neural Network

zh: 像素级并行PE阵列 + 可重构RP处理器 + 双核MPU
融合生物启发的 SOM（Self-Organizing Map）神经网络
集成高帧率CMOS图像传感器，实现 >1000 fps 的实时视觉处理
en: Pixel-parallel PE array + reconfigurable RP + dual-core MPU
Integrated bio-inspired Self-Organizing Map (SOM) neural network
On-chip CMOS image sensor; real-time processing at >1000 fps

papers.zh: JSSC: A 1000 fps Vision Chip Based on a Dynamically Reconfigurable Hybrid Architecture Comprising a PE Array Processor and Self-Organizing Map Neural Network
papers.en: JSSC: A 1000 fps Vision Chip Based on a Dynamically Reconfigurable Hybrid Architecture Comprising a PE Array Processor and Self-Organizing Map Neural Network

title.zh: 32通道集成神经信号放大芯片

zh: 芯片面积仅2.8mm × 1.9mm，单通道功耗约3μW，显著优于同类产品
输入参考噪声低于2μVrms，支持高保真神经信号采集
已在动物实验中验证，性能可媲美商用系统
en: Die size only 2.8 mm × 1.9 mm; ~3 μW per channel
Input-referred noise < 2 μV<sub>rms</sub> for high-fidelity neural acquisition
Validated in animal experiments; performance on par with commercial systems

zh: 支持64通道神经信号同时采集，每通道功耗仅 10.7 µW
噪声3.2 µVrms（@5–1kHz），100–500倍增益可调，采样率 62.5 kHz/ch
适用于大规模神经记录、脑机接口、动物实验平台、微创神经调控系统等场景
en: 64 simultaneous channels; 10.7 µW per channel
3.2 µV<sub>rms</sub> noise (@5–1 kHz), 100–500× programmable gain, 62.5 kHz/ch
Suited for large-scale neural recording, BCI, and animal experiment platforms
